review_title: Great tool, very powerful and big value for your money
description: The maker of Columns is very dedicated to help onboarding new users and also to extend the capabilities of the tools based on customer needs. Only for that i really recommend investing your time and money into that tool, because you get high value out of it !
author: Ulrich F.
pros: After a little learning curve, i'm able to generate all the visualisations i need using data from Notion, Airtable and CSV. Very happy with Columns !
cons: I would say it's the fact the because it's powerful, it can be complex to master, there are so much possibilities using it...
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Simple, yet powerful data visualization tool
description: I am happy with Columns.ai so far. I can easily visualize my data in the preferred charts or visualization formats and share them with my clients or my audiences.
author: Mohan N.
pros: It's a simple and powerful tool to visualize the data. I can present the data I've in various visualization formats available and the most important thing is it quickly does that. I haven't seen any performance lag till the moment. I can connect the data from various other applications like CSV, Google Sheets, APIs etc. and convert them to user-friendly visual graphs. I used to rely on Excel for visualizing data, but its limitations led me to try Columns.ai. Now, I can embed centralized charts on my website and update the data easily. I can also export the chart to images and share them if needed.It's a basic, simple and elegent platform to visualize the data.
cons: Well, not a dislike but the Columns team can add some advanced visualizations and complex interactivity to the system. The team behind Columns is solid and they've been updating the system frequently and I believe there'll be a time where Columns will become one of the preferred visualization tool amongst others.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Columns, a product with a possible good outcome
description: Currently Columns is missing several essential functions to be called a worthy product.I see the potential and growth of the product towards a working environment for the future which if they survive can be a very good add on for other options.
author: Alexander B.
pros: The basic interface is ok and therefore initially ok to use with small amounts of data or public data.Data reports are easy to publish.
cons: - I miss a lot of features which are standard available in other reporting products and/or tools- Lot of the data needs to be brought into the cloud for reporting due to lack of proper integrations- Roles and Rights are missing especially when you work with different teams to allow access to certain data- Its very you in development and many standard options in other products are missing.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall experience is great, very smooth data connection, helpful with AI recommendations to generate data insights, and straightforward to design beautiful story in a deck.
author: James H.
pros: I like the concept that Columns discover and shape data stories for me, get insights out of my data, and make it ready for presentation, sharing and embedding with access control is great!
cons: Dashboard - it has a function to freely filter a dashboard which is called Page on Columns

review_title: Columns: A Promising Data Visualization Tool with Room for Growth
description: While I had a positive experience using Columns for visualizing data, I ultimately decided that the product wasn't the best fit for my needs. As an analyst, I often need to embed auto-updating tables within internal documents and systems for use by other team members. Unfortunately, Columns doesn't offer a way to create and embed tables in this way, or at least I couldn't find it.
author: David S.
pros: One of its key strengths is its ease of use, especially compared to more complex tools like Looker Studio. With Columns, users can quickly and easily create charts and graphs that accurately represent their data.
cons: Despite its strengths, there are some areas where Columns could use improvement. One of the most noticeable drawbacks is its user interface. While the tool is easy to use, the overall design and layout are not particularly visually appealing. This could be a turnoff for some users who prefer a more polished and aesthetically pleasing interface & results.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Great idea, but I am spoiled with Tableau
description: Bought it on sale on a whim. product is interesting, but needs more growth
author: Keith C.
cons: I like having other options especially with less expensive BI tools. Product shows a lot of promise, but does not compare to Tableau or Power BI. Limited toolset, types of vizes

review_title: Columns is the budget data visualization tool that you have been looking for!
description: Columns has been robust from a data visualization standpoint but this has been exceeded by the caliber of customer support you receive from the team. Columns.ai is an elite SaaS that will level up the way you make charts.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: - Create charts and maps with ease - Create evergreen data visualizations with Google Sheets integration - Clone charts as templates for future charts
cons: - More pre-made templates will likely come with time, but the truth is this tool has quite appealing starting themes for your data visualizations.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: James M.
pros: I like the simplicity that it can provide for people who do not need the other more expensive and longer learning curve options
cons: Nothing. It is not super powerful bu that is its niche
